name: OneLoginConnector
description: Connects to the OneLogin SSO/IAM REST API (v2). Supports Users, Apps, Roles, Groups, Privileges, Mappings, Events, and per-user role/app assignment via OAuth2 client_credentials. Caches Bearer tokens with silent refresh on 401.

install_fields.label: OneLogin Subdomain
install_fields.help: Your OneLogin subdomain — if URL is acme.onelogin.com, enter 'acme'. Used to build https://{subdomain}.onelogin.com.

install_fields.label: API Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your OneLogin API Client ID
install_fields.help: Generate at OneLogin → Developers → API Credentials with 'Manage All' or scoped permissions.

install_fields.label: API Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your OneLogin API Client Secret
install_fields.help: Generated alongside the API Client ID. Stored encrypted via the platform secret vault.

install_fields.label: Base URL
install_fields.help: Override the per-tenant subdomain URL (staging / region). Leave blank to derive from subdomain.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap. OneLogin enforces a per-tenant API rate limit.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates subdomain, client_id, client_secret and marks the connector ready for auth. Does NOT call the OneLogin API.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Surface-compat wrapper around authenticate() — OneLogin has no auth-code exchange.

apis.name: Authenticate (Client Credentials)
apis.description: POST /auth/oauth2/v2/token with HTTP Basic client_id:client_secret + grant_type=client_credentials. Caches the resulting access_token until expires_at - 60s.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies OneLogin API connectivity by listing one user (GET /api/2/users?limit=1).

apis.name: Sync to KB
apis.description: Cursor-paginated iteration over /api/2/users → NormalizedDocument → ingest_document. Persists after_cursor in metadata for incremental syncs.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET /api/2/users — list OneLogin users with optional email filter and cursor pagination.

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: GET /api/2/users/{id} — fetch a single user by ID.

apis.name: Create User
apis.description: POST /api/2/users — provision a new user with optional username, password, and role assignments.

apis.name: Update User
apis.description: PUT /api/2/users/{id} — patch arbitrary user fields.

apis.name: Delete User
apis.description: DELETE /api/2/users/{id} — permanently remove a user.

apis.name: Search Users
apis.description: GET /api/2/users with ?email= when query contains @ else ?username=.

apis.name: Set User State
apis.description: PUT /api/2/users/{id}/state — activate (state=1) or deactivate (state=0). Raises ValueError on any other value.

apis.name: Assign Roles to User
apis.description: POST /api/2/users/{id}/add_roles — append the given role IDs to a user.

apis.name: List User Apps
apis.description: GET /api/2/users/{id}/apps — apps assigned to the given user.

apis.name: List User Roles
apis.description: GET /api/2/users/{id}/roles — role IDs assigned to the given user.

apis.name: Set User Roles
apis.description: PUT /api/2/users/{id}/roles — replace the user's role assignments with the given role IDs.

apis.name: List Apps
apis.description: GET /api/2/apps — list all SAML/OIDC apps configured in the tenant.

apis.name: Get App
apis.description: GET /api/2/apps/{id} — fetch a single app definition.

apis.name: Assign App to User
apis.description: POST /api/2/users/{id}/apps — grant a user access to an app.

apis.name: List Roles
apis.description: GET /api/2/roles — list all roles in the tenant with cursor pagination.

apis.name: Get Role
apis.description: GET /api/2/roles/{id}.

apis.name: List Groups
apis.description: GET /api/2/groups — list directory groups in the tenant.

apis.name: Get Group
apis.description: GET /api/2/groups/{id}.

apis.name: List Privileges
apis.description: GET /api/2/privileges — list custom privileges defined in the tenant.

apis.name: List Mappings
apis.description: GET /api/2/mappings — list user-to-app mapping rules.

apis.name: List Events
apis.description: GET /api/2/events — audit log of OneLogin events, filterable by since / event_type_id.

apis.name: Get Event
apis.description: GET /api/2/events/{id} — fetch a single audit event.
